source: ACT-001 Workload Worksheet filled by Andrew 2026-06-27, plus future updates from L2-OPS-006 telemetry observations on real project work (initially STG and other active Carlano projects).
notes: This file is the ongoing C2G workload definition. It is the SOURCE for the routing policy in L2-AI-003 and the measurement scope for L2-OPS-006. Per the ground-autoSE methodology this file evolves — re-run delegation policy tuning whenever this changes.

code_generation.useful_means: compiles, runs, and does the asked thing
code_generation.useless_means: doesn't compile, wrong output, or wrong API

code_review_debugging.useless_means: identifies a non-issue, misses the real one
code_review_debugging.routing_default: delegate to local (granite4.1 32K-128K context covers most files); route to Claude only for unusually large multi-file pastes

se_planning.useful_means: traceable to the input, internally consistent
se_planning.routing_default: delegate with Claude verification, or keep in Claude entirely if context is large

short_qa.useful_means: answer is correct on the facts
short_qa.routing_default: delegate to local with Claude verification (non-code → verify)

long_form_writing.useful_means: matches voice and is factually right

editing_reformatting.routing_default: delegate with Claude verification; route to Claude if document exceeds context window

summarization.useful_means: covers all major points, no fabrication
summarization.useless_means: misses major points or invents content

brainstorming.routing_default: delegate to local (low-stakes — Claude verification adds little value for divergent thinking)

cost_model_projection.method: Sum of (share_pct × per-class cost multiplier from ollama-delegate cost model).

projection_2026_06_27.vs_target_50pct: Well past target with margin; treat 50% as floor, expect 60-70% sustained.

context_window_pressure.observation_2026_06_27_initial: Originally concerned that code-review prompts ('paste a file') would exceed Granite-code 8B's 8K context window. With model selection updated to granite4.1 family (both 8b and 30b tiers support 32K-128K practical context), this pressure is largely resolved — most observed prompts fit comfortably in either tier.
context_window_pressure.mitigation: Per L2-AI-002, prompts that exceed the local context budget still route to Claude rather than truncate. Expected to fire rarely with granite4.1 model choice.
context_window_pressure.impact_on_reduction_target: Long-context fallback expected to be a small fraction of delegations. The 79% projected reduction may even be conservative since fewer code reviews need to route to Claude than previously estimated.

real_project_sources: Other Carlano Technology Solutions LLC project work
